disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain markedly worse when the pinna is pulled or the tragus is pressed, and on jaw movement
trigger_question_examples: Does it hurt more if you gently tug on your ear or press the little flap at the front?
Is the pain worse when you move your jaw or chew?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — even touching the outside of my ear or moving my jaw makes it much worse.

trigger_question_examples: Do you have diabetes or any condition that affects your immune system?
Are you on any medicines that lower your immunity, like steroids or chemotherapy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't have diabetes and I'm not on anything like that.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No swelling, redness or tenderness spreading to the bone behind the ear; no facial droop; no high fever
trigger_question_examples: Is there any redness or swelling on the bone behind your ear, or any weakness/droop in your face?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing behind the ear and my face feels normal. No real fevers.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I haven't looked behind my ear closely.
